docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $615.07 FILED BY STAR GLASS COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANGOTTI &   REILLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF MAR-18-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANGOTTI &   REILLY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAR GLASS COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGOTTI &   REILLY, INC. $575.64 PRINCIPAL, $39.43 INTEREST, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $653.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGOTTI &   REILLY, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-15-1992, DENIED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANGOTTI &   REILLY, INC.
